item.title: Jio Financial Services Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Bearish Price Action
item.description: Jio Financial Services Ltd has witnessed a notable 11.6% increase in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity despite the stock’s recent downward trajectory. This surge in open interest, coupled with rising volumes and deteriorating technical indicators, suggests a complex interplay of investor positioning and potential directional bets in the large-cap NBFC stock. Time: 42 minutes ago

item.title: FSN E-Commerce Ventures Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Bearish Price Action
item.description: FSN E-Commerce Ventures Ltd, known by its trading symbol NYKAA, has witnessed a significant surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite recent price declines, the stock’s derivatives market reveals a complex interplay of directional bets and liquidity dynamics that merit close attention from investors and analysts alike. Time: 42 minutes ago

item.title: Lodha Developers Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amidst Weak Price Action
item.description: Lodha Developers Ltd has witnessed a notable 10.33% increase in open interest in its derivatives segment, rising from 75,259 to 83,037 contracts, even as the stock price declined to a fresh 52-week low of ₹681.5. This divergence between rising open interest and falling price signals heightened market activity and shifting positioning among investors, warranting a closer examination of the underlying dynamics and potential directional bets. Time: 42 minutes ago

item.title: RBL Bank Sees Significant Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Price Action
item.description: RBL Bank Ltd has witnessed a notable 13.44% increase in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite a recent dip in share price, the surge in open interest alongside rising volumes suggests evolving directional bets and increased participation in this private sector banking stock. Time: 42 minutes ago

item.title: Adani Energy Solutions Sees Notable Surge in Derivatives Open Interest Amid Mixed Price Action
item.description: Adani Energy Solutions Ltd has witnessed a notable 10.25% increase in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity despite a recent dip in its share price. This surge in open interest, coupled with volume and price dynamics, offers insights into evolving market positioning and potential directional bets among investors. Time: 42 minutes ago

item.title: Mahindra & Mahindra Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Bearish Price Action
item.description: Mahindra & Mahindra Ltd (M&M), a stalwart in the Indian automobile sector, has witnessed a notable surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite this increase, the stock has experienced a bearish price trend over the past two days, raising questions about the underlying directional bets and market sentiment. Time: 42 minutes ago

item.title: UPL Ltd Sees Significant Open Interest Surge Amid Price Weakness
item.description: UPL Ltd., a key player in the Pesticides & Agrochemicals sector, has witnessed a notable 10.05% surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, even as its share price hit a fresh 52-week low of Rs 580.7 on 30 Mar 2026. This divergence between rising market positioning and falling equity price signals heightened speculative activity and potential directional bets among traders. Time: 42 minutes ago

item.title: Steel Authority Of India Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Bullish Market Positioning
item.description: Steel Authority Of India Ltd. (SAIL) has witnessed a significant surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market participation and potential directional bets. The stock outperformed its sector and broader indices, reflecting growing investor confidence amid rising volumes and shifting market positioning. Time: 42 minutes ago

item.title: Inox Wind Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Bearish Price Action
item.description: Inox Wind Ltd, a small-cap player in the Heavy Electrical Equipment sector, has witnessed a significant 18.4% surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity despite the stock’s recent bearish price trend. This sudden spike in open interest, coupled with volume patterns and shifting market positioning, offers critical insights into investor sentiment and potential directional bets on the stock. Time: 42 minutes ago

item.title: Ambuja Cements Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Bearish Market Sentiment
item.description: Ambuja Cements Ltd has witnessed a notable 15.3% increase in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite this surge, the stock remains under pressure, trading close to its 52-week low and continuing to underperform its sector peers amid a cautious outlook. Time: 42 minutes ago

item.title: GAIL (India) Ltd Sees Significant Open Interest Surge Amid Bearish Technicals
item.description: GAIL (India) Ltd has witnessed a notable 13.7% increase in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite trading close to its 52-week low, the large-cap gas company outperformed its sector on 30 Mar 2026, reflecting a complex interplay of bullish and bearish sentiments among traders. Time: 42 minutes ago

item.title: Bajaj Holdings & Investment Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Price Weakness
item.description: Bajaj Holdings & Investment Ltd has witnessed a significant 14.2% rise in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity despite the stock hitting a fresh 52-week low. This surge in open interest, coupled with declining prices and increased volume, suggests a complex interplay of market positioning and directional bets among investors. Time: 42 minutes ago

item.title: Kotak Mahindra Bank Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Price Weakness
item.description: Kotak Mahindra Bank Ltd (KOTAKBANK) witnessed a notable 11.1% increase in open interest in its derivatives segment on 30 Mar 2026, signalling heightened market activity despite the stock hitting a fresh 52-week low of ₹351.7. This surge in open interest, coupled with a decline in the underlying share price, suggests a complex interplay of investor positioning and potential directional bets in the private sector banking space. Time: 42 minutes ago

item.title: Sammaan Capital Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Positive Market Momentum
item.description: Sammaan Capital Ltd, a small-cap player in the housing finance sector, has witnessed a significant surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. This development comes alongside a sustained price rally and outperformance against its sector peers, suggesting evolving directional bets among traders and investors. Time: 42 minutes ago

item.title: ICICI Bank Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amidst Market Downtrend
item.description: ICICI Bank Ltd. has witnessed a notable 13.3% increase in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity despite the stock hitting a fresh 52-week low. item.title: Indus Towers Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: Indus Towers Ltd (INDUSTOWER) has witnessed a notable 17.18% increase in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite a recent three-day decline in stock price, the surge in open interest alongside rising volume suggests complex directional bets within the telecom equipment sector. Time: 42 minutes ago

item.title: ITC Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amidst Bearish Price Action
item.description: ITC Ltd., a stalwart in the FMCG sector, has witnessed a significant 11.58% surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity despite the stock trading close to its 52-week low. This development comes amid subdued price performance and falling investor participation, raising questions about the underlying market positioning and potential directional bets by traders. item.title: Cummins India Ltd Sees Significant Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Price Action
item.description: Cummins India Ltd. has witnessed a notable 10.19% increase in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite a recent price decline, the surge in open interest alongside rising volumes suggests evolving directional bets and increased participation from traders in the compressors, pumps and diesel engines sector. item.title: Tata Consumer Products Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Bearish Momentum
item.description: Tata Consumer Products Ltd (TATACONSUM) has witnessed a notable 10.62% increase in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting positioning among traders. Despite this surge, the stock continues to trade near its 52-week low, reflecting persistent bearish sentiment amid broader sectoral pressures and technical weaknesses. Time: 42 minutes ago
